SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds

Interface Stack<T>

All Superinterfaces:
Collection<T>, Higher<Collection.µ,T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
Stack.StackImpl
public interface Stack<T> extends Collection<T>
A purely functional Stack (LIFO).
